name: Homemade Vanilla-Bottled Gifts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix some medium good to high quality Bourbon with a few Fresh Vanilla Beans.
2. Cut open the beans length-wise (slit them).
3. Place the beans in a large crock or jar filled with Bourbon (lots of Bourbon).
4. Let age for 2-3 months.
5. Transfer the mixture to smaller bottles.
6. Decorate with a cute label and red/green ribbon.
Good homemade vanilla. Some people prefer to make vanilla using vodka instead of bourbon.
